# `/playsound` Command
Plays a sound.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/playsound <sound: string> [player: target] [position: x y z] [volume: float] [pitch: float] [minimumVolume: float]`

## Arguments
- `minimumVolume`: float
- `pitch`: float
- `player`: target
- `position: x y z`: position
- `sound`: string
- `volume`: float
